info.prompt:
a young South Asian girl standing in a sun-drenched courtyard, her medium-light brown skin glowing with warmth as dappled sunlight filters through the jasmine vines above. She wears an exquisite bright pink salwar kameez with intricate gold zari embroidery cascading down the dupatta draped over her shoulders, the fabric catching the light with every slight movement. Her long, straight black hair spills like liquid silk down her back, barely stirring in the gentle breeze, while traditional gold and black jhumka earrings swing delicately from her ears, matching the stack of oxidized silver and lacquer bangles that chime softly at her wrists. Her face is an oval of quiet elegance - large, expressive dark eyes framed by naturally arched brows behind round, thin-framed glasses that give her a studious charm, her lips touched with just a hint of rose-tinted gloss. One hand rests lightly on the weathered stone pillar beside her, the other holding the edge of her dupatta with unconscious grace, the gold borders of her outfit shimmering against the vibrant pink as she gazes slightly downward with a soft, contemplative expression that seems to hold centuries of cultural poise in its quietude. Behind her, the blurred suggestion of Mughal-style arches and hanging lanterns creates a living tapestry of heritage, making the entire composition vibrate with the unspoken stories of tradition meeting youthful serenity., waifu character portrait, 1girl, very high resolution, semi-realistic anime art. Intricate and impressive anime artwork with stunningly beautiful composition and style.
